items.title: prompts.chat
items.summary: f.k.a. Awesome ChatGPT Prompts. Share, discover, and collect prompts from the community. Free and open source — self-host for your organization with complete privacy.
items.summary_cn: f.k.a. Awesome ChatGPT提示。分享、发现和收集社区提示。免费开源--为您的组织提供完全隐私的自助出租服务。
items.comment: 开源大模型又添新成员，prompts.chat这次能否撼动闭源模型的地位？

items.title: LLMs-from-scratch
items.summary: Implement a ChatGPT-like LLM in PyTorch from scratch, step by step
items.summary_cn: 在PyTorch中从头开始逐步实现类似ChatGPT的LLM
items.comment: 新模型来了，是骡子是马拉出来遛遛，别光看宣传看实测。

items.title: Variance Reduction for Expectations with Diffusion Teachers
items.title_cn: 扩散教师的期望方差减小
items.summary: Pretrained diffusion models serve as frozen teachers feeding downstream pipelines such as text-to-3D, single-step distillation, and data attribution. The teacher gradients these pipelines consume are Monte Carlo (MC) expectations over noise levels and Gaussian noise samples; their estimator variance...
items.summary_cn: 预训练扩散模型充当下游管道（如文本到3D、单步蒸馏和数据归因）的冷冻教师。这些管道消耗的教师梯度是蒙特卡洛（ MC ）对噪声水平和高斯噪声样本的期望；它们的估计方差...
items.comment: AI模型迭代快得飞起，但有几个真正解决了实际问题？等落地案例。

items.title: Quantifying Hyperparameter Transfer and the Importance of Embedding Layer Learning Rate
items.title_cn: 量化超参数转移和嵌入层学习率的重要性
items.summary: Hyperparameter transfer allows extrapolating optimal optimization hyperparameters from small to large scales, making it critical for training large language models (LLMs). This is done either by fitting a scaling law to the hyperparameters or by a judicious choice of parameterization, such as Maxima...
items.summary_cn: 超参数转移允许从小尺度到大尺度外推最佳优化超参数，这对于训练大型语言模型（ LLM ）至关重要。这是通过将缩放定律拟合到超参数或通过明智的参数化选择来实现的，例如最大值...
items.comment: AI模型迭代快得飞起，但有几个真正解决了实际问题？等落地案例。

items.title: DeepWeb-Bench: A Deep Research Benchmark Demanding Massive Cross-Source Evidence and Long-Horizon Derivation
items.title_cn: DeepWeb-Bench ：需要大量跨源证据和长期推导的深度研究基准
items.summary: Deep research, in which an agent searches the open web, collects evidence, and derives an answer through extended reasoning, is a prominent use case for frontier language models. Frontier deep research products score high on existing benchmarks, making it difficult to distinguish their capabilities ...
items.summary_cn: 深度研究是前沿语言模型的一个突出用例，其中代理搜索开放网络，收集证据，并通过扩展推理得出答案。前沿深度研究产品在现有基准上得分较高，难以区分其能力...
items.comment: 新模型来了，是骡子是马拉出来遛遛，别光看宣传看实测。

items.title: Claude 3.5 Sonnet - Anthropic's Latest Model

items.comment: 模型发布热闹非凡，能不能用、好不好用，用户说了算。

items.title: GPT-4o Mini - OpenAI's Cost-Effective Model

items.title: AI Regulation Updates - EU AI Act Implementation

items.comment: AI领域新动态，保持关注，别被营销号带节奏。
